ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., American League) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., East) */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "runner_up_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that was the runner-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's performance in a season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage in the season */,
  "games_behind" TEXT /* Games behind the leading team in the division */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* Home game record (e.g., 52-29) */,
  "road_record" TEXT /* Road game record (e.g., 45-36) */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team in the season */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed by the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team season for the home team */,
  "opponent_team_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team season for the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., Yankee Stadium) */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_season_id") REFERENCES team_seasons ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_season_id") REFERENCES team_seasons ("team_season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., pitcher, catcher) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently on */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team (if applicable) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'2") */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player (e.g., 200 lbs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's performance in a season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in (RBIs) */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_season_id") REFERENCES team_seasons ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., manager, pitching coach) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is currently on */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the coach joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the coach left the team (if applicable) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the coach */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_seasons" (
  "coach_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach's performance in a season */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team season */,
  "games_managed" INTEGER /* Number of games managed */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_seasons_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_seasons_team_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_season_id") REFERENCES team_seasons ("team_season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team staff, analyst, fan) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., team, game, player) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource being accessed (e.g., team, game, player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the conference belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the division belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach who won the award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season when the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)
